chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-387 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. 30.09.2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General along with Naheed Ali Mirani, ADC-I, Sukkur on behalf of Deputy Commissioner Sukkur (Respondent NO.6)..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG files compliance report on behalf of Deputy Commissioner Sukkur (Respondent No.6), same is taken on record. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Same is the position since last two dates of hearing, which reflects that the petitioner has no interest to proceed with the matter. Under the circumstances, instant petition is hereby dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
